opinion.h4: HEARNE ET AL. v. SMYLIE, GOVERNOR OF IDAHO, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF IDAHO. No. 617. Decided February 1, 1965.
opinion.p: Allan G. Shepard, Attorney General of Idaho, and M. Allyn Dingel, Jr., Assistant Attorney General, for Williams et al., appellees.

This cause is continued on the docket until the Court Conference of May 21, 1965, before which time the parties are asked to advise the Court by supplemental briefs as to the progress made in reapportioning the Idaho Legislature.
